mapper.select: /* FormMypageMapper.selectFarPricePlan 현재 요금제 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS prvRateCd , A.RATE_NM AS prvRateNm , A.BASE_AMT AS prvBaseAmt , A.RMK AS prvRmk , B.APP_START_DD AS appStartDd , NVL(A.BASE_AMT, 0) + (NVL(A.BASE_AMT, 0) * 0.1) AS baseVatAmt FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A , (SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.SOC AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1

/* FormMypageMapper.selectFarPricePlanList 변경 가능 요금제 목록 */ SELECT PRV_RATE_GRP_CD AS prvRateGrpCd , PRV_RATE_GRP_NM AS prvRateGrpNm , PRV_RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD AS prvRateGrpTypeCd , PRV_RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM AS prvRateGrpTypeNm , PRV_RATE_CD AS prvRateCd , PRV_RATE_NM AS prvRateNm , PRV_PTRN_RATE_YN AS prvPtrnRateYn , PRV_PAY_CL_CD AS prvPayClCd , PRV_DATA_TYPE AS prvDataType , PRV_RATE_TYPE AS prvRateType , PRV_RMK AS prvRmk , PRV_BASE_AMT AS prvBaseAmt , PRV_APPL_STRT_DT AS prvApplStrtDt , PRV_APPL_END_DT AS prvApplEndDt , NXT_RATE_GRP_CD AS nxtRateGrpCd , NXT_RATE_GRP_NM AS nxtRateGrpNm , NXT_RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD AS nxtRateGrpTypeCd , NXT_RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM AS nxtRateGrpTypeNm , NXT_RATE_CD AS nxtRateCd , NXT_RATE_NM AS nxtRateNm , NXT_PTRN_RATE_YN AS nxtPtrnRateYn , NXT_PAY_CL_CD AS nxtPayClCd , NXT_DATA_TYPE AS nxtDataType , NXT_RATE_TYPE AS nxtRateType , NXT_RMK AS nxtRmk , NXT_BASE_AMT AS nxtBaseAmt , NXT_APPL_STRT_DT AS nxtApplStrtDt , NXT_APPL_END_DT AS nxtApplEndDt , NVL(NXT_BASE_AMT, 0) + (NVL(NXT_BASE_AMT, 0) * 0.1) AS baseVatAmt FROM VW_GROUP_BY_RATE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE PRV_RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND NXT_APPL_END_DT = '99991231' ORDER BY NXT_BASE_AMT DESC

/* FormMypageMapper.selectFarPriceAddInfo 요금제 적용일 조회 */ SELECT APP_START_DD FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(APP_START_DD, 0, 6) AS APP_START_DD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY DECODE(SOC, #{soc}, SUBSTR(APP_START_DD, 0, 6) + 1, SUBSTR(APP_START_DD, 0, 6)) DESC ) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{cntrNo} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' ) WHERE RNUM = 1

/* FormMypageMapper.getEnggInfo 약정 정보 */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo , APP_END_DATE AS appEndDate , CASE WHEN APP_END_DATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'N' WHEN APP_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'Y' WHEN APP_END_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' END AS enggYn FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , ENGG_END_DT AS APP_END_DATE FROM VW_CNTR_ENGG_SELF@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} )

/* FormMypageMapper.getCloseSubList 해지해야 할 부가서비스 목록 */ SELECT CMN.CD_DSC AS rateNm , FEA.SOC AS rateCd FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP FEA , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP CMN , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE FEA.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND FEA.SOC = CMN.CD_VAL AND CMN.GRP_ID = 'RCP9030' AND CMN.USG_YN = 'Y' AND EXPIRATION_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'A' ORDER BY FEA.SOC

/* FormMypageMapper.getromotionDcList 가입해야 할 프로모션 부가서비스 */ SELECT DISTINCT B.SOC AS rateCd , ADDITION_NAME AS rateNm , RANTAL AS baseAmt , A.PRMT_ID AS alFlag FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP A , MSF_ADDITION B WHERE A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN ('UU', 'AL') AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y'

/* FormMypageMapper.getChrgPrmtIdSocChg 평생할인 프로모션 ID 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT(PRMT_ID) FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN STRT_DT AND END_DT AND ORGN_ID = '1100011741' AND REQ_BUY_TYPE IN ('UU', 'AL') AND ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' AND MNP_YN = 'Y' AND ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND ROWNUM = 1

/* FormMypageMapper.selectRateMst QoS 정보 조회 */ SELECT QOS_DATA_CNT_DESC AS qosDataCntDesc , CALL_CNT AS callCnt FROM MSF_RATE_MST WHERE TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd} LIMIT 1
